mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company_analysis (application_case_id, job_posting_id, job_posting_revision, company_summary, recent_issues, industry, competitors, interview_points, sources, verified_facts, ai_inferences, source_type, checked_at, refresh_recommended_at, requested_provider, actual_provider, actual_model, fallback_used, attempt_path, run_mode) VALUES (#{applicationCaseId}, #{jobPostingId}, #{jobPostingRevision}, #{companySummary}, #{recentIssues}, #{industry}, #{competitors}, #{interviewPoints}, #{sources}, #{verifiedFacts}, #{aiInferences}, #{sourceType}, #{checkedAt}, #{refreshRecommendedAt}, #{requestedProvider}, #{actualProvider}, #{actualModel}, #{fallbackUsed}, #{attemptPath}, #{runMode})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM company_analysis WHERE application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM company_analysis WHERE application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE company_analysis SET company_summary = #{companySummary}, recent_issues = #{recentIssues}, industry = #{industry}, competitors = #{competitors}, interview_points = #{interviewPoints}, sources = #{sources}, verified_facts = #{verifiedFacts}, ai_inferences = #{aiInferences}, confirmed_at = #{confirmedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId}
